message:
style(tui): apply gofmt formatting to style and theme packages

Apply consistent Go formatting across TUI infrastructure packages:

styles/tokens.go:
- Align struct field names in Typography, LayoutTokens, ZIndex
- Standardize spacing in const declarations
- Clean up design token struct definitions

styles/tokens_test.go:
- Format test assertions consistently

styles/styles.go:
- Minor formatting adjustments

theme/semantic.go:
- Align semantic color definitions
- Format theme struct fields consistently

icons/icons.go:
- Align icon constant definitions
- Format agent type icon mappings

icons/icons_test.go:
- Clean up test formatting

components/cass_search.go:
- Format CASS search component struct
- Align method parameter lists

components/preview.go:
- Minor formatting cleanup

These changes improve code readability and ensure consistent
formatting across the TUI package hierarchy. No functional
changes - purely cosmetic gofmt cleanup.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
